prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan L28E (2.8L inline-6) with a forged internals build featuring JE 9.0:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft, paired with a T3/T4 Garrett GT35R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 12 psi of boost on a custom tubular stainless steel exhaust manifold by ISIS Performance, with a front-mount intercooler from GReddy (Type-S) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Burns Stainless muffler

Full standalone engine management conversion using a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from Jenvey Dynamics (45mm diameter) and a custom fuel system featuring a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the 240Z chassis), polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full set), and a custom front sway bar from Suspension Techniques (1.25-inch diameter) paired with a rear sway bar from Addco (0.875-inch diameter), along with a custom subframe reinforcement kit by Z Car Depot
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (fiberglass) with custom front canards and a duckbill rear spoiler from AIT Racing, painted in Nissan Heritage Color Code 602 (Sunset Orange) with a matte black roof and mirror caps

Custom 17x9.5-inch front and 17x10.5-inch rear wheels from Work Meister S1 3P (ET15 front, ET5 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/17 front, 275/40/17 rear), with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) by Project Kics

Full interior retrim in black Alcantara with red stitching by Katzkin, featuring a custom roll cage by Hard Dog Motorsports (8-point bolt-in), a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom gauge cluster with Defi Advance BF series gauges (boost, oil pressure, and water temperature) mounted in a custom aluminum panel
